name: Stuffed Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse quinoa well and set aside to drain.
2. Chop onion, garlic, and sundried tomatoes; set aside.
3. Cut tops off bell peppers and rinse bodies clear of seeds. Trim the seed pod from the tops and save them.
4. Heat 2 cups broth in a medium saucepan until boiling. Add quinoa and sundried tomatoes; cover and simmer for 12 minutes.
5. Mix buckwheat groats with egg white (or substitute) until coated. Cook in a dry frying pan over medium heat for 2-3 minutes, stirring to keep groats separated.
6. Add remaining broth, onion, garlic, and spices to the pan; cover and simmer for 10-12 minutes.
7. Drain quinoa and transfer it to a bowl with buckwheat groats once finished cooking. Stir in tomato puree and favorite tomato sauce until well mixed.
8. Spoon mixture into bell peppers and replace tops.
9. Place remaining broth or water (to just cover the bottom of the steamer rack) in a large pot, add peppers, secure lid, and bring to boil on stove. Simmer for 20-30 minutes until peppers are soft.
10. Serve.
